arts.ttl: Borussia Dortmund in contact with Ex-Benfica manager Roger Schmidt
arts.sum: Ruhr Nachrichten reports that Borussia Dortmund are in contact with Roger Schmidt as they look for replacements if head coach Nuri Şahin is to be sacked. Former Manchester United manager Erik…

arts.ttl: Wolves transfer news: Manu Silva deal off as Portuguese giants win race for midfielder?
arts.sum: Wolverhampton Wanderers are reportedly handed a significant January transfer blow having lost out on a deal for Vitoria de Guimaraes midfielder Manu Silva.

Yet just eight games ago, before matchday 13 on the weekend of November 9/10, Barça were six points clear of Madrid and 10 ahead of Atlético . Hansi Flick’s men have picked up just six points in their last eight league games - a run that has brought just the one win, against Real Mallorca on December 3, and four defeats.

arts.ttl: ‘We probably have to be perfect’ - Pedri talks Barca’s title hopes
arts.sum: The result means Barca finish the weekend now seven points behind Real Madrid, and Pedri knows that his team face a tough challenge making up that gap. Barcelona midfielder Pedri has warned his team they probably can’t afford to drop any more points if they are to win La Liga this season.

arts.ttl: Arsenal transfer battle: Mikel Arteta's plans reportedly under threat from Barcelona for European striker
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly in a transfer battle with Barcelona for one of Europe's most wanted strikers, and could face a race against time to sign him this January.

arts.ttl: Hansi Flick condemns racist chanting aimed at Barcelona star
arts.sum: Hansi Flick offered his support to Alejandro Balde after he was racially abused during Barcelona's 1-1 draw with Getafe in La Liga.

arts.ttl: Former Barcelona star Neymar on the verge of transfer away from Saudi Arabia
arts.sum: Barcelona icon Neymar Jr. is all set for an incoming departure from the Saudi Pro League. That’s according to transfer insider Fabrizio Romano, who points towards Brazilian giants Santos as…

arts.ttl: Barcelona fans highlight another officiating inconsistency after Real Madrid 4-1 Las Palmas
arts.sum: Supporters of Barcelona have taken to social media once more on Sunday evening, to make their frustrations with alleged inconsistencies in La Liga’s officiating clear. This comes owing to developments…
